_metadata.description: Hasbro G1 Transformers items (1984-1986) — The Transformers original toy line
import_instructions: 1. Ensure continuity_families, factions, sub_groups, manufacturers, toy_lines, characters, character_appearances are seeded
2. For each item: resolve manufacturer_slug, toy_line_slug, character_slug, character_appearance_slug to UUIDs
4. metadata JSONB holds: status, variant_type, base_product_code, sub_brand, notes

metadata.notes: Series 1 Mini Vehicle. Micro Change MC-04 Mini CAR Robo mold. Yellow Volkswagen Beetle
Series 1 Mini Vehicle. Micro Change MC-04 Mini CAR Robo mold. Red Porsche 924 Turbo
Series 1 Mini Vehicle. Micro Change MC-04 Mini CAR Robo mold. Orange semi cab
Series 1 Mini Vehicle. Micro Change MC-04 Mini CAR Robo mold. Red Pontiac Firebird Trans Am
Series 1 Mini Vehicle. Micro Change MC-04 Mini CAR Robo mold. Green Land Rover Defender
Series 1 Mini Vehicle. Micro Change MC-04 Mini CAR Robo mold. Blue/red 4WD truck
Series 1 Cassette 2-pack. Micro Change Cassette molds. Includes Ravage (black jaguar) and Rumble (blue humanoid). Soundwave's cassettes
Series 1 Cassette 2-pack. Micro Change Cassette molds. Includes Frenzy (red/blue humanoid) and Laserbeak (red condor). Soundwave's cassettes
Series 1 Autobot Car. Diaclone Car Robot No. 03 Countach LP500S mold. Yellow Lamborghini Countach
Series 1 Autobot Car. Diaclone Car Robot No. 02 Countach LP500S mold. Red Lamborghini Countach
Series 1 Autobot Car. Diaclone 4WD Jeep mold. Green Mitsubishi J59 military jeep
Series 1 Autobot Car. Diaclone Ligier JS11 F1 mold. Blue/white Ligier Formula 1 racer
Series 1 Autobot Car. Diaclone Fairlady Z mold (shared with Prowl, Smokescreen). Silver/black Datsun 280ZX. Rare silver variant exists; most common release is silver-gray
Series 1 Autobot Car. Diaclone Fairlady Z mold (shared with Bluestreak, Smokescreen). Black/white Datsun 280ZX police car
Series 1 Autobot Car. Diaclone Porsche 935 mold. White Porsche 935 Turbo with Martini racing livery
Series 1 Autobot Car. Diaclone Onebox Cherry Vanette mold (shared with Ratchet). Red Nissan Cherry Vanette. Toy lacks a head — robot mode uses a sticker face on the windshield
Series 1 Autobot Car. Diaclone Onebox Cherry Vanette mold (shared with Ironhide). White/red ambulance Nissan Cherry Vanette. Toy lacks a head — same sticker-face design as Ironhide
Series 1 Autobot Car. Diaclone Lancia Stratos Turbo mold. White Lancia Stratos with Alitalia racing livery
Series 1 Autobot Car. Diaclone 4WD Hilux mold. Black Toyota Hilux 4WD pickup with camper shell
Series 1 Decepticon Jet. Diaclone Jet Fighter F-15 mold (shared with Thundercracker, Skywarp). Gray/red/blue F-15 Eagle
Series 1 Decepticon Jet. Diaclone Jet Fighter F-15 mold (shared with Starscream, Skywarp). Blue F-15 Eagle
Series 1 Decepticon Jet. Diaclone Jet Fighter F-15 mold (shared with Starscream, Thundercracker). Black/purple F-15 Eagle
Series 1 Decepticon Communications. Micro Change MC-10 Cassette Man mold. Blue microcassette recorder. Includes Buzzsaw microcassette
Series 1 Decepticon Leader. Micro Change MC-12 Gun Robo mold. Walther P-38 pistol with stock, scope, and silencer accessories
Series 1 Autobot Commander. Diaclone Battle Convoy mold. Red/blue Freightliner FL86 cab-over with gray trailer, Roller scout vehicle, and accessories
Gift set containing all six Constructicons (Scrapper, Hook, Bonecrusher, Scavenger, Long Haul, Mixmaster). First combiner team in the Transformers line
Series 2 Autobot Car. Diaclone Honda City Turbo mold. Blue Honda City Turbo
Dinobots Assortment 1 (05770). Diaclone Dinosaur Robo mold. Dinobot leader. Gray/gold T-Rex. Product code is assortment-level — individual Hasbro item number not documented
Dinobots Assortment 1 (05770). Diaclone Dinosaur Robo mold. Gray/red Triceratops. Product code is assortment-level
Dinobots Assortment 1 (05770). Diaclone Dinosaur Robo mold. Gray/gold Brontosaurus. Product code is assortment-level
Dinobots Assortment 2 (05771). Diaclone Dinosaur Robo mold. Gray/gold/red Stegosaurus. Product code is assortment-level
Dinobots Assortment 2 (05771). Diaclone Dinosaur Robo mold. Gray/red Pteranodon. Toy has red chest plate, cartoon is blue/gray. Product code is assortment-level
Micro Change MC-20 Microscope mold. Red/black functioning microscope. Autobot scientist
Micro Change MC-21 Cassetteman mold. Orange/yellow boombox. Autobot counterpart to Soundwave. Compatible with standard microcassette tapes
Bandai Macross VF-1S Super Valkyrie mold. White/red jet fighter. Not featured in cartoon due to Harmony Gold licensing conflict; cartoon equivalent is Skyfire with a different design
ToyCo/Astro Magnum mold. Purple laser gun with electronic light and sound. Sold through Radio Shack stores in the US as an exclusive
Toybox mold. Motorized tank/rocket base with walking robot mode. Yellow/orange/gray. One of the largest Series 2 toys
Series 2 Mini Vehicle. Blue/yellow hovercraft
Series 2 Mini Vehicle. Red A-10 Thunderbolt II attack plane. Only flying Minibot
Series 2 Mini Vehicle. Red/maroon M551 Sheridan tank
Series 2 Mini Vehicle. Blue dune buggy
Series 2 Mini Vehicle. Green/yellow flying saucer. Only UFO alt-mode in G1
Constructicon. Diaclone Construction Vehicle mold. Green/purple bulldozer. Forms Devastator's left arm
Constructicon. Diaclone Construction Vehicle mold. Green/purple excavator. Forms Devastator's right arm
Constructicon leader. Diaclone Construction Vehicle mold. Green/purple front-end loader. Forms Devastator's right leg
Constructicon. Diaclone Construction Vehicle mold. Green/purple crane truck. Forms Devastator's upper torso
Constructicon. Diaclone Construction Vehicle mold. Green/purple dump truck. Forms Devastator's lower torso
Constructicon. Diaclone Construction Vehicle mold. Green/purple cement mixer truck. Forms Devastator's left leg
Insecticon. Diaclone Insector mold. Black/yellow/purple grasshopper
Insecticon leader. Diaclone Insector mold. Black/yellow/purple stag beetle
Insecticon. Diaclone Insector mold. Black/yellow/purple Japanese rhinoceros beetle. Uses cerebro-shells for mind control
Jumpstarter. Blue drill tank. Pull-back auto-transforming gimmick. Never animated in cartoon; prominent Wrecker in Marvel UK comics
Jumpstarter. White/blue space shuttle. Pull-back auto-transforming gimmick. Never animated in cartoon; prominent Wrecker in Marvel UK comics
Cassette 2-pack. Includes Ratbat (purple bat) and Frenzy (blue humanoid, reissue). Soundwave's cassettes. Product code assigned in 1985 series but shipped 1986
Cassette 2-pack. Includes Rewind (black humanoid) and Steeljaw (gold lion). Blaster's cassettes. Product code assigned in 1985 series but shipped 1986
Cassette 2-pack. Includes Ramhorn (red rhinoceros) and Eject (blue humanoid). Blaster's cassettes. Product code assigned in 1985 series but shipped 1986
Triple Changer. Tan/purple MiG-25 jet and Type 74 tank. First wave of Triple Changers
Triple Changer. White/purple space shuttle and locomotive. US release color scheme differs from Japanese version
Deluxe Insecticon. Bandai Beetras mold. Purple/black stag beetle. Excluded from cartoon due to Takara licensing conflict with Bandai
Deluxe Insecticon. Bandai Beetras mold. Yellow/black Japanese rhinoceros beetle. Excluded from cartoon due to Takara licensing conflict
Deluxe Insecticon. Bandai Beetras mold. Green/black cicada. Excluded from cartoon due to Takara licensing conflict
Deluxe Insecticon. Bandai Beetras mold. Red/black grasshopper. Excluded from cartoon due to Takara licensing conflict
Series 2 Autobot Car. Diaclone Countach LP500S mold retool (shared with Sideswipe). White/red Lamborghini Countach fire chief
Series 2 Autobot Car. Diaclone Crane mold (shared with Inferno). Orange crane truck
Series 2 Autobot Car. Diaclone Fairlady Z mold retool (shared with Prowl, Bluestreak). Red/blue/yellow Datsun 280ZX race car #38
Series 2 Autobot Car. Diaclone Fire Engine mold (shared with Grapple). Red Mitsubishi Fuso fire engine with extending ladder
Series 2 Autobot Car. Diaclone Toyota Hilux mold retool (shared with Trailbreaker). Green Toyota Hilux tow truck
Series 2 Autobot Car. Diaclone Corvette mold. Blue Chevrolet Corvette C3 with flying car mode
Deluxe Vehicle. Takatoku/Dorvack Bell AH-1S Cobra helicopter mold. Blue attack helicopter. Excluded from cartoon due to Takara licensing; prominent Wrecker in Marvel UK
Deluxe Vehicle. Takatoku/Dorvack VV-54AR mold. Orange/green armed 4WD buggy. Excluded from cartoon due to Takara licensing; prominent Wrecker in Marvel UK
Omnibot. Diaclone Double Changer mold. Red Ferrari 512 BB. Mail-order exclusive — not available at retail. Triple changer (car/armed car/robot)
Omnibot. Diaclone Double Changer mold. White Toyota Celica XX. Mail-order exclusive. Triple changer (car/armed car/robot)
Omnibot. Diaclone Double Changer mold. Silver Mazda Savanna RX-7. Mail-order exclusive. Triple changer (car/armed car/robot)
Autobot City. Triple changer: robot, city, and battle station modes. Includes Scamper, Six-Gun, and Slammer mini-vehicles. Largest Autobot in the 1986 line
Decepticon Leader. Gray/purple/orange triple changer: robot, laser cannon, and laser pistol. Electronic light-up cannon. Toy colors differ significantly from cartoon's purple/gray
Autobot City Commander. Diaclone Powered Convoy mold. White cab-over truck with blue/red car carrier armor. Inner robot is a white Optimus Prime-style figure
Autobot. Motorized walking electronics. White/blue/red space shuttle that separates into bird and lynx. Splits into two independent creatures that combine
Aerialbot combiner gift set. Contains Silverbolt, Air Raid, Skydive, Fireflight, Slingshot. First Autobot combiner team
Stunticon combiner gift set. Contains Motormaster, Dead End, Breakdown, Wildrider, Drag Strip
Protectobot combiner gift set. Contains Hot Spot, Streetwise, Blades, First Aid, Groove
Aerialbot. Black/white F-15 Eagle. Forms Superion's left leg
Aerialbot. Gray/red F-16 Fighting Falcon. Forms Superion's right leg
Aerialbot. Red/white F-4 Phantom II. Forms Superion's right arm
Aerialbot. White AV-8B Harrier II. Forms Superion's left arm
Stunticon. Maroon Porsche 928. Forms Menasor's left leg
Stunticon. White Lamborghini Countach. Forms Menasor's right leg
Stunticon. Gray Ferrari 308 GTB. Forms Menasor's left arm
Stunticon. Yellow Tyrrell P34 F1 race car. Forms Menasor's right arm
Combaticon. Green Leopard 1 tank. Forms Bruticus's left leg
Combaticon. Tan FMC XR311 jeep. Forms Bruticus's right leg
Combaticon. Brown space shuttle. Forms Bruticus's right arm
Combaticon. Gray/purple UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter. Forms Bruticus's left arm
Protectobot. White/red Nissan 300ZX police car. Forms Defensor's left leg
Protectobot. White/gold police motorcycle. Forms Defensor's right leg
Protectobot. Red/white rescue helicopter. Forms Defensor's right arm
Protectobot. White Toyota Town Ace ambulance. Forms Defensor's left arm
Transformers: The Movie hero. Red/orange/yellow futuristic sports car with engine-block exhaust pipes. Becomes Rodimus Prime in the film
Autobot Leader. Red/orange/gray Winnebago-style futuristic RV. Hot Rod's evolved form after receiving the Matrix of Leadership
Transformers: The Movie. Blue futuristic Cybertronian hovercar. Fastest Autobot. Voiced by John Moschitta Jr
Transformers: The Movie. Teal/gray futuristic pickup truck. Veteran Autobot warrior
Aerialbot leader. White Concorde. Forms Superion's torso. Afraid of heights despite being a jet
Stunticon leader. Black Kenworth K100 semi-truck. Forms Menasor's torso. Rival of Optimus Prime
Combaticon leader. Blue/green anti-aircraft truck. Forms Bruticus's torso
Protectobot leader. Blue fire engine. Forms Defensor's torso
Transformers: The Movie. Orange/brown motorcycle. Junkion leader. Speaks in TV quotes. Voiced by Eric Idle
Transformers: The Movie. Orange futuristic car. Speaks in rhyming couplets. Mini Vehicle size class
Mini Vehicle. Tan/brown Land Rover Defender retool (Brawn remold)
Mini Vehicle. White Pontiac Firebird Trans Am retool (Windcharger remold)
Mini Vehicle. Yellow Volkswagen Beetle retool (Bumblebee remold). Often confused with Bumblebee due to similar color and mold
Mini Vehicle. Blue semi cab retool (Huffer remold)
Mini Vehicle. Red 4WD truck retool (Gears remold)
Battlecharger. Black Lotus Esprit. Pull-back auto-transforming gimmick
Battlecharger. White Lotus Esprit. Pull-back auto-transforming gimmick. Companion to Runabout
Autobot Triple Changer. Green/yellow armored car and helicopter. Transformers: The Movie character. Wrecker leader in comics
Autobot Triple Changer. Orange/black dune buggy and helicopter
Autobot Triple Changer. Gray/red aircraft carrier and jet fighter. Afraid of water and flying despite both alt modes
Decepticon Triple Changer. White/purple fuel tanker truck and Boeing 767 jet
Predacon leader. Black/orange/yellow lion. Forms Predaking's torso
Predacon. Red/orange tiger. Forms Predaking's right leg
Predacon. Black/orange eagle. Forms Predaking's right arm
Predacon. Red/yellow bull. Forms Predaking's left leg
Predacon. Yellow/orange rhinoceros. Forms Predaking's left arm
Sharkticon. Purple/teal shark-monster. Quintessons' foot soldiers. Transformers: The Movie
Conehead Seeker. White/black F-15 Eagle retool with conical nosecone intakes. Diaclone Jet Fighter mold variant
Conehead Seeker. Blue/tan F-15 Eagle retool with forward-swept delta wings. Engines cause fear in enemies
Conehead Seeker. Maroon/black F-15 Eagle retool with VTOL fan intakes. Loud and boastful
Transformers: The Movie. Blue/gray futuristic hovercraft. Tracker. Leader of the Sweeps. Created by Unicron from Thundercracker
Transformers: The Movie. Purple/gray futuristic space jet. Galvatron's second-in-command. Created by Unicron from Skywarp (or Bombshell — origin disputed)
